metadata.tool_description:
Query Kubernetes-specific metrics from Datadog.

Args:
    metric_name: The Datadog metric name (e.g., "kubernetes.cpu.usage.total",
                "kubernetes.memory.usage", "kubernetes.network.rx_bytes")
    from_minutes_ago: Start time as minutes ago from now (default: 60)
    to_minutes_ago: End time as minutes ago from now (default: 0 = now)
    cluster: Cluster name to query. Uses default cluster if not specified.
    namespace: Filter by Kubernetes namespace (optional)
    aggregation: Aggregation function: avg, sum, max, min (default: avg)

Returns:
    JSON string with metric data grouped by tags.
